# Grgurevic UI

> Grgurevic UI is a premium, Apple-inspired Svelte 5 and SvelteKit component library built on top of shadcn-svelte. It recreates signature iOS and macOS design aesthetics using spring physics, magnetic pull, specular cursor-tracking border highlights, and real refractive SVG Liquid Glass containers.

Grgurevic UI is designed to wow users at first glance with rich, tactile interactive components. It leverages Svelte 5 runes (`$state`, `$derived`) and snippet compositions, integrating with TailwindCSS v4 for modern, high-performance styling.

## Design Primitives & Physics

Grgurevic UI stands out by employing physics-based animations rather than static CSS transitions:
- **Liquid Glass Refraction:** An advanced SVG filter simulating real light-bending glass with parameters for Index of Refraction (IOR), bezel width, chromatic aberration (RGB channel prism splitting), and saturation boosts.
- **Specular Highlights:** Border light reflections that dynamically track the user's cursor positions.
- **Magnetic Pull:** Interactive elements elastic-wise pull toward the cursor, matching Apple's tvOS/macOS hover behaviors.
- **Spring Scaling:** Elements scale down on cursor click actions and spring back elastically using GSAP animation physics.

---

## Component Showcase & Live Docs

The library contains 14 core components showcased in the dashboard:

- [Button](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/button): iOS-style button with spring physics scaling, magnetic pull, and 3D specular light glare reflections.
- [Button Group](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/button-group): Combines multiple Buttons together into a segmented capsule bar.
- [Card](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/card): Tactile card containers with customizable headers, contents, and footers.
- [Dialog](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/dialog): Tactile alert prompt mimicking native iOS system alerts.
- [Dropdown Menu](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/dropdown-menu): Glassmorphic popover featuring lists, checkboxes, and sub-menus.
- [Glass View](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/glass-view): Depth primitive block with SVG-refractive liquid glass filters and drag inertia physics.
- [Input](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/input): Text field with border focus glares, specular highlights, and clear wiggles.
- [Input Group](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/input-group): Segmented border frame combining inputs, text addons, and buttons.
- [List](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/list): iOS settings style table list rows with system icon slots and toggles.
- [Navigation Stack](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/navigation-stack): Coordinates Apple's scrolling large-to-small title shifts with GSAP blur offsets.
- [Select](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/select): Glassmorphic popup select wrapper built using Bits UI interactives.
- [Sheet](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/sheet): Slide-out drawer panels sliding from viewport edges.
- [Slider](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/slider): Elastic range slider input with spring physics.
- [Switch](https://ui.grgurevic.click/components/switch): Smooth Apple-style toggling knob switch.

---

## CLI Installation Commands

Grgurevic UI uses `shadcn-svelte` to add components directly to your local project. Run the following command to download the desired component's Svelte code and local dependencies:

- **Button:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/button.json`
- **Button Group:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/button-group.json`
- **Card:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/card.json`
- **Dialog:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/dialog.json`
- **Dropdown Menu:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/dropdown-menu.json`
- **Glass View:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/glass-view.json`
- **Input:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/input.json`
- **Input Group:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/input-group.json`
- **List:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/list.json`
- **Navigation Stack:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/navigation-stack.json`
- **Select:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/select.json`
- **Separator:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/separator.json`
- **Sheet:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/sheet.json`
- **Slider:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/slider.json`
- **Switch:** `npx shadcn-svelte@latest add https://ui.grgurevic.click/r/switch.json`

---

## Core Component API & Examples

### Glass View (`GlassView`)
Used to wrap page areas or components to create true refractive glass overlays.

#### Props
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `variant` | `"prominent" \| "bordered" \| "secondary" \| "translucent" \| "ghost" \| "destructive"` | `"translucent"` | Visual style preset |
| `magnetic` | `boolean` | `true` | Pulls container towards cursor position |
| `scale` | `boolean` | `true` | Spring scale compression feedback on cursor click |
| `specular` | `boolean` | `true` | Cursor-tracking border light glares |
| `liquidGlass` | `boolean` | `false` | Enables physical SVG-refraction (Chromium optimized) |
| `refractiveIndex` | `number` | `1.5` | Index of refraction curvature. Range: 1.0 to 2.4 |
| `bezelWidth` | `number` | `20` | Depth of bezel refraction boundary (px) |
| `displacementScale` | `number` | `40` | Offset scaling displacement factor |
| `surfaceProfile` | `"circle" \| "squircle" \| "concave" \| "lip"` | `"squircle"` | Bezel curve style shape profile |
| `chromaticAberration` | `boolean` | `false` | Enables realistic RGB prism color channels splitting |
| `saturationBoost` | `number` | `1.3` | Saturation boost multiplier behind refracted zone |
| `backgroundBlur` | `number` | `0.3` | SVG pixelation blur filter multiplier |

#### Composition Example
```svelte
<script lang="ts">
	import { GlassView } from "$lib/components/ui/glass-view";
</script>

<GlassView
	variant="translucent"
	class="w-64 h-32 flex items-center justify-center"
>
	<span class="text-sm font-bold">Liquid Refraction</span>
</GlassView>
```

### Button (`Button`)
Interactive tactile action trigger.

#### Props
All `GlassView` props are available for the `Button`, plus:
- `disabled: boolean` (default `false`) - Freezes hover and press handlers.
- `size: "xs" | "sm" | "default" | "lg" | "icon" | "icon-xs" | "icon-sm" | "icon-lg"` (default `"default"`) - Button sizes.
- `href: string` (default `undefined`) - Render as an HTML anchor styled as a Button.

#### Composition Example
```svelte
<script lang="ts">
	import { Button } from "$lib/components/ui/button";
</script>

<Button variant="prominent" size="default" magnetic={true} specular={true}>
	Hover and Click Me
</Button>
```

### Navigation Stack (`NavigationStack`)
Dynamic header with scrolling blur offsets and title changes.

#### Composition Example
```svelte
<script lang="ts">
	import * as NavigationStack from "$lib/components/navigationStack";
	import { Button } from "$lib/components/ui/button";
	import { ChevronLeft } from "@lucide/svelte";
</script>

<NavigationStack.Root>
	<NavigationStack.Header title="Profile Settings">
		{#snippet leading()}
			<Button variant="translucent" size="icon" onclick={() => history.back()}>
				<ChevronLeft class="size-4" />
			</Button>
		{/snippet}
		{#snippet trailing()}
			<Button variant="translucent">Edit</Button>
		{/snippet}
	</NavigationStack.Header>

	<div class="px-6 py-12">
		<NavigationStack.LargeTitle>Profile Settings</NavigationStack.LargeTitle>
		<!-- Scrollable page content goes here -->
	</div>
</NavigationStack.Root>
```

## Optional

- [Grgurevic UI GitHub Repo](https://github.com/grgurevic/ui): Source code repository for package development.
- [shadcn-svelte](https://shadcn-svelte.com): Main underlying svelte UI primitives platform.
- [GSAP](https://gsap.com): Scroll and physics motion animation framework powering spring transformations.
